parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets clk and rst logic threshold

modeling_constraints: Treat vin as a bounded load or disturbance control, not as a supply rail.
Do not use current contributions, transistor devices, AC/noise analysis, KCL/KVL regulation loops, or validation side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Initialization or active-high reset sets out to 0.60 V and metric to 0.9 V.
At each eligible rising clock crossing, vin is clamped to 0 through 0.9 V and target equals 0.62 V minus 0.055 times that load.
Out advances by 0.35 of the remaining target error on each eligible rising clock crossing.
The held output remains within 0.25 V through 0.75 V.
Metric equals 0.9 V minus four times the absolute output-to-target error, clamped to 0 through 0.9 V.
Out and metric hold between rising clock crossings except for transition smoothing.

title: LDO Regulator Macro Model
